# Concord Trade

> Concord Trade is a B2B international sourcing and trade solutions company helping global buyers source reliable manufacturers, compare supplier options, manage OEM/ODM projects, coordinate samples and orders, and reduce sourcing risks from China and Asia.

## Services
- [China Product Sourcing](https://www.concord-trade.com/services/china-product-sourcing/): Find and compare reliable Chinese manufacturers, collect quotes, manage samples.
- [Supplier Verification](https://www.concord-trade.com/services/supplier-verification/): Verify suppliers before ordering to reduce sourcing risk.
- [OEM / ODM Sourcing](https://www.concord-trade.com/services/oem-odm-sourcing/): Private label, custom packaging, product development, MOQ negotiation, production follow-up.

## Industries
- [Pet Product Sourcing](https://www.concord-trade.com/industries/pet-product-sourcing/)
- [Medical Consumables & PPE Sourcing](https://www.concord-trade.com/industries/medical-consumables-sourcing/)
- [Bags, Apparel & Home Goods Sourcing](https://www.concord-trade.com/industries/bags-apparel-home-goods-sourcing/)
